title: Krebs cycle
script_summary: An insightful exploration of the Krebs cycle, unraveling its secrets without oversimplifying.

segments.voiceover: What if I told you the key to energy production lies in a cycle hidden in your cells?
Introducing the Krebs cycle, a series of reactions critical for generating ATP, the energy currency of life.
It all starts with acetyl-CoA, but where does it come from? Think fats, carbs, and proteins.
As it enters the cycle, it’s transformed through eight steps, releasing carbon dioxide and energy-rich molecules.
This intricate dance fuels everything from muscle movement to brain function. But there's still more we don't fully understand.
Curious about how cellular processes impact your life? Follow for more science insights!
